name: Zoji's Hearty Oatmeal Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to a moderate temperature.
2. In a large bowl, mix together the water, powdered milk, brown sugar, butter (margarine), and salt until well combined.
3. Add the bread flour, quick oatmeal, and vital gluten to the mixture. Stir until all ingredients are evenly incorporated.
4. If using yeast, sprinkle it over the dough and stir gently to combine.
5. Transfer the batter to a baking dish suitable for your oven's "regular" cycle setting.
6. Bake in the preheated oven until the loaf is cooked through and golden brown on top.
7. Allow the bread to cool before slicing and serving. Enjoy this hearty, tasty white loaf as part of your New Year celebrations!
